feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: It's a Small World, After All
entry.summary:
Author: whosmorales

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,425Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: After moving to Metropolis for work, Bruce finds himself increasingly lonely and disconnected from his own life. Much in the same way, Clark's temporary job as a barista seems less temporary every day that goes by. Disillusioned and dissatisfied with their circumstances, both men are starstruck upon meeting each other, and try to maintain and understand their connection. or Bruce Wayne is a frustrated office worker running on little sleep. Thankfully, Clark Kent is here to sell him coffee.

entry.title: Paradise Island
entry.summary:
Author: Nigaki

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,647Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 221

Summary: Billionaire Buce Wayne and his entourage goes missing when on a cruise on his private yacht somewhere on the Pacific. No one knows he survived a storm and sinking, landing on a uninhabited island. Thankfully for him, Superman, Earth's darling superhero, finds him there and will take him home.Right?

entry.title: Sharing is Caring
entry.summary:
Author: synner (xsynnerx)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,747Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: “Yes, my… my soul hurt. I needed to see you. I… I'll shut up. I know you don't want to hear it.” Bruce hesitated before stepping closer. This just kept getting stranger. “I want to hear it now,” he urged. “I bare my soul to you,” Kal said finally, continuing to whisper. “I share my soul with you.” Or: Bruce accidentally bonds himself to a Kryptonian

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part Three
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,341Chapters: 6/15Kudos: 6

Summary: The Silax treatment is ready, but the cure is no simple rescue. To silence the queen inside him, Aven must let the inhibitor fail, wake the thing Weyland-Yutani built him to carry, and trust Bruce, Clark, Amanda, his brothers, and the children he left behind to keep him alive through the worst of it. For the first time, everyone is in the same room. Secrets come out. Old wounds split open. Family stops being something Aven can protect from a distance and becomes the only reason he can face what comes next. But beyond the Fortress, LexCorp’s stolen files reveal that Weyland’s work has not stopped with Aven. The procedure may end one nightmare. It may also uncover the next. (God, I really suck at summaries lmao)

entry.title: Penumbra
entry.summary:
Author: Buukkin

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,179Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 3

Summary: Ultraman made it out of the black hole with only his last orders in mind: Kill Superman.He fails. He gets to know Clark. He gets to know himself. And when Clark really needs to go back to his life, he calls in a trusted friend to help the newly liberated clone find his footing in this world.Bruce Wayne just wants to keep a dangerous and unstable metahuman under control at first, but his guest proves to be surprisingly charming.

entry.title: Birds Always Come Home Eventually
entry.summary:
Author: Synthiostlye

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 504Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: My take on the Reverse!Robins AU (or whatever). It's almost all completely headcanons, but with enough canon bits so they're not completely separate.My dialogue is going to suck because I almost exclusively write poems, short stories, and descriptive pieces (not so much action and conversation). So... most of these chapters will be QUITE short. I know. It irritates me, too.Comments? Critiques? Suggestions? Anything, really? Feel free to write in the comments and give kudos! (Just go a little easy on me <3)

entry.title: Two Months In Kansas
entry.summary:
Author: Superbat_fan02

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,238Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 105

Summary: Alfred forces Bruce to spend two months on vacation in Kansas, a small, sparsely populated town, to give him a break from his grueling training and the mental exhaustion of spending almost every night at his computer reading thousands of Gotham police reports. On this short trip, Bruce meets Clark, a boy a year younger than him who is his complete opposite. Clark is cheerful, honest, empathetic, and responsible. The golden boy of Kansas, always with a smile and a pleasant tone of voice. But Bruce doesn’t believe that’s the whole story. Clark lives on and grew up on the farm where there are reports of a UFO crash, and, mysteriously, his “parents”—who weren’t parents at the time—are now his parents. Was it really a coincidence that Clark appeared after this supposed UFO news? Furthermore, not to mention that Bruce was already considered tall and well-built for his age, Clark was even taller and bigger than him. He always seemed to hear more than he intended to, or would carelessly lift objects that would be a challenge even for adults to lift. Bruce was sure of it—there was something about Clark, and he wanted to find out what it was.

entry.title: two thousand years and twenty more
entry.summary:
Author: A_Lady_of_Night

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,452Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 8

Summary: When the mysterious disappearances of Greek artefacts from The Gotham Museum might spread to The Metropolis Museum of Art and History as well, Bruce and Clark plan to investigate at the new exhibit opening the next day. Unfortunately, their plans get derailed and stopping a possible small-time burglary expedition spirals into disaster. Or: Superman loses his powers and gets turned into a merman. No one is happy about this.

entry.title: The Gotham Years
entry.summary:
Author: x_starfry

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,326Chapters: 11/45Kudos: 172

Summary: Damian al Ghul was raised to be a weapon. Then Bruce Wayne brought him home to a manor full of vigilantes, unresolved trauma, and far too many people willing to love him anyway. A series of one-shots following Damian’s childhood — from terrifyingly tiny assassin baby to Gotham’s smallest Robin.   Featuring: accidental family bonding Bruce Wayne panic-parenting tiny League-trained behaviors Batfamily chaos emotional damage healing Alfred running the entire household and one very small child slowly realizing he is safe Updates whenever inspiration strikes. (very often)

entry.title: Sanatorium
entry.summary:
Author: riversiders

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,236Chapters: 9/20Kudos: 126

Summary: They're forcing Bruce to rest. Tucked away on the Kents' farm in rural Kansas with Superman as his keeper, he has little choice but to cooperate. At least Dick is happy—happier. It's good for him to be around normal, well-adjusted people. They can be there for him in ways Bruce is incapable of. The more he reads of his mother's journal, the more certain he becomes; Bruce Wayne was never destined to be part of a happy family. Meanwhile, back in Gotham, the Batclub's hard at work. It'll be a dirty job, bringing Thomas Elliot to justice. Luckily, Lois, Harvey, and Selina are perfectly comfortable with the morally grey.

entry.title: I Want to Know You
entry.summary:
Author: dueefbigfard

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,708Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 123

Summary: Clark heard the static of Nightwing’s earpiece crackle to life as Oracle started talking. “There’s an attempted breaking and entering, half a mile south of you. Can you—” “On it.” Dick sprang to his feet and rolled his shoulders back, and suddenly Nightwing wasn’t just a story Clark had shared with a little boy all those years ago. “That’s my cue. See you around, Supes.” “Of course. Real quick, though,” Clark added, a little desperate. “If he’s not like…that, then what is Bruce actually like when he’s drunk?” “My friend,” Dick said, holding Clark by the shoulders in mock seriousness. “Perhaps one day you will know—but today is not that day.” “Right, of course, sure.” Bats and their secrets. “Be careful out there, buddy.” “Always am,” Dick said, lying through his teeth as he dropped ever so casually from the building.   5 times Clark thought Bruce was drunk, and one time he actually was

entry.title: Cage of Roses
entry.summary:
Author: endofer

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,720Chapters: 2/14Kudos: 24

Summary: The story Clark had heard wasn't entirely clear and previous monster hunters who'd come investigating had been sent packing, unwilling to talk about it. Some details remained the same between retellings: there was a monstrous creature in this town, it punished crime and protected the town from invasion, and it occasionally asked for a human sacrifice.In a castle overlooking a town lives a monstrous bat creature. It is the town’s protector and a source of fear. Clark Kent hears about these rumours and comes to investigate. A retelling Beauty and the Beast with MonsterHunter!Clark and Beast!Bruce ft. Alfred and a handful of batkids.

entry.title: look at us, turned into lyrics
entry.summary:
Author: brucewaynessluttyboots (missakwatson)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,348Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 111

Summary: Rationally, Bruce knows it was bound to happen sooner or later. It’s a minor miracle that it even took this long—a testament to Superman and Batman’s effectiveness as a team, to the fluid coordination they’ve fought hard to hone. That doesn’t make it any easier to stomach, in the moment or while they’re debriefing with the rest of the League.***Or: Superman takes bullets for people all the time—but what happens the first time he takes one for Bruce?

entry.title: An Emerald's Gaze
entry.summary:
Author: Kyronie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,075Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 237

Summary: "Guys are we sure this is the correct place?' Clint asked pushing his way through rock and rubble. "Guys!" Natasha called out standing over an unknown substance on the ground. When the Avengers answered the alarm about a surge in magical energy in Queens, they were expecting finding Loki or another sorcerer. Finding a freshly resurrected Spider-Man sitting in a green fluorescent puddle was not on that list. OR Peter Parker is revived using the Lazarus Pits and the Avengers have to figure out how their youngest member has returned from the dead. Also why he now looks like a green eyed skunk. Bruce Wayne wants to know why his family's tragedy was done again.

entry.title: Still In Need
entry.summary:
Author: lover_of_blue_roses

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,153Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 64

Summary: Superman's heat is coming upon him again. At least this time they have some idea of what is in store even if it will be the first time sharing it with the Batman.
